title: Trump says UFC transformation at White House to begin soon
shortDescription: President Trump on May 1 said construction will begin over the next week on a structure to hold a UFC event on the South Lawn of the White House.

title: Trump threatens higher EU car tariffs
shortDescription: President Donald Trump threatened to raise tariffs on European Union cars to 25%, claiming the European Union "did not adhere to the trade deal."

title: Trump ‘not satisfied’ with current Iran deal
shortDescription: President Trump said they have made strides but that he is "not satisfied" with the current offer from Iran to end the conflict.

title: Trump threatens EU with 25% tariffs on cars and trucks
shortDescription: Trump threatened to impose 25% tariffs on cars and trucks imported from the European Union by accusing those countries of violating a trade deal.

title: Farm bill clears US House. See how Texas lawmakers voted, why
shortDescription: The U.S. House passed the farm bill, drawing praise from Texas agriculture leaders and split votes from state Democrats.

title: It’s day 60 since Trump announced the war in Iran, a critical deadline | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Per the War Powers Resolution, President Trump must now seek congressional approval to continue military operations in the war on Iran.

title: Will Congress ok the Iran war or will Trump just continue it anyway?
shortDescription: In testimony at the Senate Armed Services Committee, SecDef Hegseth argued that the working ceasefire with Iran pauses the 60-day deadline.

title: President Trump's approval ratings hit new lows
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has had a net-negative approval rating for about a year. As midterms draw closer, Republicans hope to keep control of Congress.

title: May is jam-packed with midterm elections. Here's what to look for
shortDescription: A slew of incumbents are out, making room for fresh faces.

title: Trump jokes he'd look '20 pounds heavier' in a bulletproof vest
shortDescription: President Trump said he has resisted wearing a bulletproof vest, saying it would make him look "20 pounds heavier" amid renewed security concerns.

title: Trump on rumors his son may host 'Apprentice'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump responded to rumors that 'The Apprentice' may return on Amazon, hosted by his son Donald Trump Jr.

title: Trump: Secret Service not shot by friendly fire
shortDescription: President Trump said that a Secret Service agent shot at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner was not struck by friendly fire.

title: Trump's parting gift to royals: Tariff relief on Scotch
shortDescription: As King Charles III and Queen Camilla wrapped their US visit, President Trump said he gave the UK some tariff relief on whiskies.

title: Congress finally ends Homeland Security shutdown
shortDescription: The House finally ended the historic Department of Homeland Security shutdown, passing a funding bill for the agency with seemingly unanimous support.

title: Trump reacts to Iran participating in World Cup
shortDescription: President Trump reacts after FIFA president confirmed Iran will compete at the 2026 World Cup in the United States despite ongoing conflict concerns.

title: TrumpIRA.gov to broaden retirement savings access
shortDescription: Trump signs executive order creating TrumpIRA.gov, which workers whose employers don't offer 401(k) plans can use to enroll in a retirement plan.

title: Secret Service agent was not hit by friendly fire, Trump says
shortDescription: Trump said a Secret Service agent who was shot during the White House Correspondents' dinner wasn't struck by friendly fire.

title: House passes farm bill without controversial pesticides provision
shortDescription: The bill, which was amended to remove what critics called a "loophole" for pesticide companies, still faces an uphill battle in the Senate.

title: Trump considers wearing bulletproof best
shortDescription: President Donald Trump joked about wearing a bulletproof vest when asked about being shot at.

title: Trump nominates Fox News contributor as US surgeon general
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has nominated Dr. Nicole Saphier as the next U.S. surgeon general after the confirmation of his previous pick stalled.

title: Trump says Tennessee plans to redraw House maps after court ruling
shortDescription: President Trump said Tennessee Republicans have committed to redistricting to eliminate the state's only Democratic seat.
